series.curator_notes: The series has three distinct runs: (1) Original TV series episodes 1-80 (1982-1985), (2) Christmas specials 1-6 (2008), and (3) 'Neue Geschichten' (New Stories) episodes 1-20 (2023-2025). The Swiss German variant artist (0afAudZE1uMJydPJk9SmRI) contains Swiss German language versions - excluded as separate series. Multiple compilation albums exist that combine episodes - these have been excluded to avoid duplicates. The original numbered episodes from the TV series are the definitive versions.
